---
title: "EpiPulse"
page-layout: full
execute:
  eval: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
editor: visual
---

::: {.pixel-hero}
::: {.pixel-hero-copy}
<div class="hero-brand-lockup">
  <img src="images/epipulse-logo.svg" alt="EpiPulse logo" class="hero-logo">
  <span class="hero-kicker">Section 8 Public Health Organization</span>
</div>

# Public health, made more human.

EpiPulse connects evidence, community action, and implementation support so health programs can move from ideas to real-world outcomes with more clarity, trust, and speed.

<div class="hero-cta-row">
  <a class="btn btn-dark btn-lg" href="about.qmd">Explore Our Mission</a>
  <a class="btn btn-outline-dark btn-lg" href="programs.qmd">View Programs</a>
  <a class="btn btn-outline-dark btn-lg" href="contact.qmd#volunteer">Join as a Volunteer</a>
</div>

<div class="hero-trust-row">
  <div class="trust-pill"><strong>8</strong> internal divisions</div>
  <div class="trust-pill"><strong>Research</strong> to implementation</div>
  <div class="trust-pill"><strong>Ethics</strong> and transparency first</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.pixel-hero-visual}
<div class="device-stage">
  <div class="device-shell">
    <div class="device-screen">
      <div class="screen-orb orb-one"></div>
      <div class="screen-orb orb-two"></div>
      <div class="screen-orb orb-three"></div>
      <div class="screen-copy">
        <span>Field-ready public health support</span>
        <strong>Evidence. Equity. Action.</strong>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="floating-stat stat-top">
    <span>Community-centered</span>
    <strong>Programs designed for people, not just reports</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="floating-stat stat-bottom">
    <span>Operationally transparent</span>
    <strong>Compliance, systems thinking, and measurable social benefit</strong>
  </div>
</div>
:::
:::

::: {.launch-strip}
<p class="launch-eyebrow">What EpiPulse helps deliver</p>
<div class="launch-grid">
  <div>
    <strong>Applied epidemiology</strong>
    <p>Research, analysis, and evidence translation for public health decisions.</p>
  </div>
  <div>
    <strong>Implementation support</strong>
    <p>Programs, workflows, and capacity building for institutions and communities.</p>
  </div>
  <div>
    <strong>Responsible growth</strong>
    <p>Transparency, ethics, partnerships, and systems built for long-term trust.</p>
  </div>
</div>
:::

## Designed Around Real Public Health Work

::: {.feature-stack}
::: {.feature-panel .feature-panel-large}
<div class="feature-copy">
  <p class="feature-label">Mission platform</p>
  <h3>One organization, multiple ways to strengthen public health systems.</h3>
  <p>EpiPulse brings together research quality, implementation science, community partnership, and digital coordination so programs are not fragmented across disconnected efforts.</p>
</div>
<div class="feature-art feature-art-gradient">
  <div class="signal-card">
    <span>Mission</span>
    <strong>Generate evidence and turn it into action.</strong>
  </div>
  <div class="signal-card">
    <span>Vision</span>
    <strong>Healthier, more equitable, and more resilient communities.</strong>
  </div>
  <div class="signal-card">
    <span>Objective</span>
    <strong>Build rigorous, ethical, transparent public health infrastructure.</strong>
  </div>
</div>
:::

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.feature-panel}
<div class="feature-copy">
  <p class="feature-label">Research to implementation</p>
  <h3>From analytics and evidence reviews to community-ready execution.</h3>
  <p>We support epidemiology, health data analysis, prevention planning, and implementation pathways that can be used by practitioners and institutions.</p>
</div>
:::

::: {.feature-panel}
<div class="feature-copy">
  <p class="feature-label">People-centered collaboration</p>
  <h3>Built to work with volunteers, institutions, and partners.</h3>
  <p>The organization is structured for cross-functional delivery through partnerships, education, software systems, and impact monitoring.</p>
</div>
:::

::: {.feature-panel}
<div class="feature-copy">
  <p class="feature-label">Safe and transparent growth</p>
  <h3>Programs activate in line with compliance and verification standards.</h3>
  <p>EpiPulse is in its setup phase, with public materials and support channels being published carefully and responsibly.</p>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

## Core Focus Areas

::: {.objective-grid .objective-grid-polished}
::: {.objective-card}
### Evidence and Research
Advance epidemiology, data analysis, and applied public health research around real population health priorities.
:::

::: {.objective-card}
### Prevention and Programs
Strengthen prevention, health promotion, and implementation models in community and institutional settings.
:::

::: {.objective-card}
### Capacity and Systems
Provide training, technical support, and systems inputs that improve delivery quality and readiness.
:::

::: {.objective-card}
### Ethics and Equity
Embed ethics, equity, One Health thinking, and data responsibility across every workflow.
:::
:::

## How the Mission Gets Delivered

::: {.division-showcase}
<div class="division-copy">
  <p class="feature-label">Internal structure</p>
  <h3>Eight divisions support delivery from strategy to field execution.</h3>
  <p>Our setup is designed so scientific rigor, operations, governance, education, and resource mobilization grow together rather than in silos.</p>
  <p><a class="inline-link" href="public_health_data_analysis.qmd">Explore the Resource Hub</a></p>
</div>

<div class="division-list">
  <div class="division-item"><span>01</span> Research and Evidence</div>
  <div class="division-item"><span>02</span> Public Health Implementation</div>
  <div class="division-item"><span>03</span> Collaboration and Partnerships</div>
  <div class="division-item"><span>04</span> Accounts and Legal Compliance</div>
  <div class="division-item"><span>05</span> Software and Systems</div>
  <div class="division-item"><span>06</span> Education and Fellowship</div>
  <div class="division-item"><span>07</span> Monitoring, Evaluation, Impact, and Ethics</div>
  <div class="division-item"><span>08</span> Grants, Funding, and Resource Mobilization</div>
</div>
:::

## Start Here

::: {.quick-links-grid}
::: {.quick-link-card}
### Transparency
Understand the legal, compliance, and accountability foundation of the organization.

[View Transparency](transparency.qmd)
:::

::: {.quick-link-card}
### Programs Roadmap
See the program areas being prepared for activation and public release.

[View Programs](programs.qmd)
:::

::: {.quick-link-card}
### Community
Find ways to collaborate, volunteer, or connect with the EpiPulse network.

[Join the Community](community.qmd)
:::
:::
